reviewsSummary.note: No implementation features in workspace-modernization milestone. This milestone consisted only of Cargo.toml (rust-version = 1.94) and README.md (prerequisites: Rust 1.94+) documentation updates.

notes: The workspace-modernization milestone consisted only of setting rust-version = '1.94' in Cargo.toml and documenting the prerequisite in README.md.
There are no implementation features associated with this milestone - it was purely a documentation/process change.
Pre-existing issue: evidence_pipeline::tests::test_evidence_pipeline_chunking hangs when running the full test suite. This is unrelated to the workspace-modernization changes and existed prior.
